title: Action decision
description: Decides a robot action from fused perception (pose + status) and task context. MarvinDocker implements this. Pure structured data, no arrays.

objects.description: Pose results from the pose stage (per-object).

best_category.description: Object state/category from the status stage.

action_params.description: Parameters for the chosen action (trajectory, gripper, timing).

done.description: Whether the task is considered complete.
